hypothesis: Re-register the leakage-safe Phase4D model as the immutable Phase5 baseline.
change_reason: Establish a versioned comparison point before introducing a deep ensemble.

hypothesis: Five independently initialized patient-level MIL models improve accuracy and epistemic error detection.
change_reason: Phase4D produced two high-confidence errors and MC Dropout epistemic error-detection AUC of 0.167.

hypothesis: Fold-local self-supervised spectral pretraining improves representations and corrects systematic high-confidence errors.

hypothesis: A first-derivative view adds peak-shape information and improves patient classification over intensity-only P5-01.
